message:
feat(fp-io): add read_csv comment parameter parity (frankenpandas-s6vq)

Adds CsvReadOptions.comment: Option<u8> matching the pandas
pd.read_csv(comment=...) parameter. Lines whose first non-whitespace
character is the comment byte are skipped entirely. Routed through
csv::ReaderBuilder::comment so header detection, skiprows, and
row-count accounting all see the cleaned record stream without extra
bookkeeping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
